test.command: mix test && cd web && npx vitest run

blockingIssues.description: Feature declares fulfillment of VAL-CROSS-084 but implementation/verification does not validate Knowledge Space accumulation across acts (glossary/changelog).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when agent-browser verification is mandatory versus optional, and when adding new Vitest tests is expected versus not practical (e.g., Mermaid/SVG-heavy interactions or CSS-only/navigation tweaks).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple er-diagram reviews reported successful features validated without new tests and/or without agent-browser despite current wording implying hard requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit fulfills-to-evidence checklist step: each assertion listed in a feature's fulfills must map to at least one concrete verification artifact before marking complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m3-cross-flows reported VAL-CROSS-084 in scope but omitted direct verification evidence, causing scrutiny failure.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refresh milestone status and API notes: remove stale 'ER diagram pending' statement and document /api/map/solution/domain payload shape plus Mermaid implementation quirks discovered during M3 work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three reviews independently flagged stale ER status; reviewers also noted repeated rediscovery of API payload details and Mermaid sanitization/id-targeting quirks.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate stale-architecture reports across er-diagram-page, er-navigation, and m3-cross-flows
Cold-start API race note from m3-cross-flows handoff
